raw.message: Now the Whopper is made your way, with better ingredients in every bite. Enjoy it today.

hook.summary: A man takes a large, satisfying bite of a Whopper burger.
hook.visual_action: Close-up shot of a man eating a burger with a neon crown logo behind him.
hook.voiceover_transcript: We listened. You told us how to make the Whopper better.

scene_flow: Introduction with a man enjoying a Whopper in a restaurant setting.
Fast-paced montage of diverse people eating the burger in different locations like cars and outdoors.
Close-up beauty shots highlighting the fresh ingredients and the new glazed bun.
Concluding shot of a woman eating with the brand's new slogan and logo.
on_screen_text: THERE'S A NEW KING & IT'S YOU
cta_text: THERE'S A NEW KING & IT'S YOU
audience_proxy: Hungry adults and fast-food fans seeking a premium and improved classic burger experience.
